translations.01KT6NWT8XSM920GCAR4Z43EJ5: 确定要删除 {} 吗？此操作无法撤销。任何引用此密钥的 Agent 或环境都将失去对它的访问权限。

notes: search_item.rs: render_item command-palette label, Text::new_inline -> UI; translated, preserved {} and ellipsis (…). code_page.rs: 5x ToggleSettingActionPair::new first arg = description_suffix, which mod.rs:764 renders as format!("Enable {suffix}")/("Disable {suffix}") in the command palette (struct doc: 'The user will actually read these strings') -> regular UI nouns, translated as standalone noun phrases. claude.rs: PluginInstallError.message (mod.rs:56, 'Short description shown in the toast notification', Display writes message) is user-facing -> 'Platform plugin installation did not take effect' and 'Plugin update did not take effect' translated. The two 'Post-...version check: ...still outdated\n' literals are log.push_str into PluginInstallError.log (mod.rs:58, 'Detailed log of every command/step... log file the user can inspect') NOT the toast -> log/telemetry payload, flagged telemetry_payload, target null, trailing \n shape moot. auth_secret_ftux_view.rs:726 format! -> add_ephemeral_toast (toast UI), translated, preserved {name}. delete_auth_secret_confirmation_dialog.rs: description -> Dialog::new body, title 'Delete secret' -> Dialog title; both translated, preserved {}, full-width punctuation, Agent kept English (brand).
